title: euphorbia leucophylla
intro: Euphorbia leucophylla, also known as Zebra Cactus or Silver Mist, is a succulent plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its striking, horizontal stripes and is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Euphorbia leucophylla include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to promote wound healing and skin health.
